status_reason: The exact 556b source route is fingerprinted, but no exact 556b executable, frozen S1-only fixture or captured DXF/STL pair is yet available.

required_members.role: Windows program entry and unit dependencies
S1 block builders and DXF/STL emitter
active drawtimber S1 assignment, constituent assembly and placement transforms
active scale state and normal/FDM key-offset controls

build_probe.environment: Linux x86_64, Lazarus 3.0, Free Pascal 3.2.2, isolated temporary Lazarus configuration
build_probe.first_fatal_error: OpenTemplot2024.lpr cannot find the Windows ShellAPI unit in the native Linux target
build_probe.disposition: Obtain a provenance-recorded exact 556b Windows executable, or reproduce a Windows/cross build with the exact external package versions, modifications, hashes and licences; do not patch the source into a different revision merely to make an oracle.

observed_candidate.location_description: existing local Templot Bottles installation; absolute user path intentionally not recorded

fixture.required_form: one frozen short straight plain-line Templot box containing only ordinary S1 chair code 1 instances
fixture.required_record: local fixture filename, SHA-256, creation steps, template count, timber count and S1 chair-instance count

settings.rail_profile: C&L / EMGS / S4Soc Code 75 bullhead rev:A
settings.key_placement: central; set both normal and FDM maximum off-centre values to 0 full-size inches so random direction is geometrically neutral
settings.manufacturing_compensation: all FDM/resin rail-fit, jaw, edge, beefing, shrinkage and thin-timber corrections disabled or identity; record every effective numeric value
settings.custom_component_files: optional corroboration only; named DXF blocks remain the required constituent evidence

comparison_limits: Artifact hashes establish provenance and byte identity, not geometric equivalence.
DXF face order and STL tessellation order are not canonical.
A later ChairDefinition comparison must separately agree dimensional, section/profile, surface-distance, rail-interface, topology, transform and solid-validity metrics and tolerances.
The Templot capture remains reference-only and cannot supply canonical production values.

minimum_evidence: Exact 556b executable fingerprint and visible version evidence
Reproducible acquisition or build provenance including external dependencies
Disposable Wine/Bottles or Windows profile identifier
Evidence that no everyday Templot profile or user file was used or modified
GUI-confirmed effective setting record with compensation disabled or identity
Local untracked DXF and STL hashes
Passing semantic summary for all four named components and the assembled chair faces

acceptance_gate.required_review: Project geometry review and project-owner acceptance of the exact source, fixture, settings, semantic summary, limitations and later comparison tolerances.
